1. All API endpoints require valid userSession in Authorization header
2. BASE_URL and payload JSON keys are case-sensitive
3. Use proper error handling for all API calls
4. Maintain rate limits to avoid being blocked
5. Always validate response status before processing data
6. Keep userSession secure and refresh when needed
7. Use appropriate product types (INTRADAY, LONGTERM, MTF)
8. Verify instrument IDs and exchange codes
9. Handle market hours and trading calendar restrictions
10. Implement proper logging for audit trails
